name: Cinnamon Raisin Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the flour, cereal, 1/4 cup of sugar, baking powder, and cinnamon in a medium-sized bowl and set aside.
2. In a small bowl, combine the milk, egg, margarine, and vanilla, blending well.
3. Stir the mixture into the dry ingredients, just until all are moistened.
4. Stir in the raisins.
5. Spoon the mixture into 12 greased 2 1/2-inch muffin pan cups.
6. Bake at 400 degrees F for 18 to 20 minutes or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
7. Remove from the oven and cool for 10 minutes in the pan.
8. Remove from the pan and brush the tops of the muffins with the fruit juice.
9. Roll them in the remaining sugar.
